interpretations: Discourse organization difficulty; Weak claim-evidence-reasoning structure; Limited monitoring and revision; Feedback viewed but not used; Emerging adaptive help-seeking; Paragraph underdeveloped for task expectations
onsite_interventions: paragraph_restructuring_support; claim_evidence_reasoning_scaffold; guided_revision_checklist; feedback_decoding_session; onsite_clarification; idea_expansion_support
adaptive_feedback:
Your paragraph has a relevant idea, but its organization and cohesion need improvement. Strengthen the topic sentence, develop one supporting point clearly, and use linking expressions such as "furthermore", "in addition", or "as a result".
 Your paragraph needs stronger argument development. Add one clear example or piece of evidence, then explain how it supports your claim.
 Before revising, identify the main weakness in your paragraph. Decide which one change would improve it most, then revise with that goal in mind.
 You viewed the feedback, but your text does not yet show sufficient revision. Make at least one content-level change and one cohesion-level change before resubmitting.
 Your message shows active engagement with the writing task. During the onsite session, we will clarify the feedback and revise one sentence together.
 Your paragraph is shorter than expected for this task. Add one supporting detail and one explanatory sentence to develop the argument more fully.
next_writing_goal: Expand paragraph with one supporting detail and one explanatory sentence.
